filename: User Interviews - HCP First Contacts - Laurine Fourel.docx
summary: This document contains interview notes from a nurse named Laurine Fourel working in a French nursing home. It details her daily responsibilities, challenges with elderly patients regarding dementia and medication adherence, and her philosophy on building trust through communication. The insights highlight the emotional and relational aspects of elderly care beyond medical tasks.
